player_demand.description: Higher number of views/purchases increases price.

player_performance.description: Recent match stats (goals, assists, ratings) affect price.

squad_rarity.description: Players from less common squads increase in value.

global_market_trends.description: Overall game economy affects minor adjustments on all prices.

logic.calculate_new_price: new_price = base_price_cc * (1 + demand_factor*0.4 + performance_factor*0.3 + rarity_factor*0.2 + trend_factor*0.1)
logic.apply_limits: If new_price < base_price_cc*min_multiplier, set to min; If new_price > base_price_cc*max_multiplier, set to max
logic.notify_user: show subtle animation on player card when price changes
logic.market_refresh: every update_interval_seconds, recalculate all players prices

network_sync.description: Updates propagate to all clients in online mode to ensure consistency.
